headline: Shell Puts Canada at Heart of Growth Plans in $13.6 Billion Deal

headline: Phillips 66 Set to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
summary: PSX is projected to post a 55-cent loss in Q1 on $29.5B in revenues, with midstream revenues and product sales volumes expected to fall y/y.

headline: Shell Agrees to Buy Canada’s ARC Resources for $13.6 Billion
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Shell Plc agreed to buy Canadian producer ARC Resources Ltd. for $13.6 billion, its biggest deal in more than a decade as it seeks to bolster oil and gas reserves.
